# Copilot Instructions for this Project

## Code Style
- Use C# 12 features when available
- Follow Microsoft naming conventions
- Use nullable reference types

## Architecture
- Follow MVC pattern for web controllers
- Use dependency injection for services
- Keep business logic in separate service classes

## Testing
- Write unit tests using xUnit
- Use meaningful test method names
- Cover edge cases and error scenarios

## Comments and Documentation
- Always add "written by Copilot" in the first line of comments generated by Copilot (DEMO PURPOSES ONLY)
